description: Leg and arm stretches before training
Practice all basic stances: front stance and back stance
50 straight punches with proper form and breathing
Practice high block and low block 30 times each
Practice front kicks 20 times each leg with proper chamber
Practice side kicks 15 times each leg focusing on hip rotation
Practice first kata with correct timing
Practice second kata with proper stances
Fast execution of basic techniques for 2 minutes
One-leg balance holds and slow-motion kicks
Practice tying belt correctly and neatly
